title: Kensington USB Wired Mouse, USB 3.0 Computer Mouse, 1000 DPI Optical Tracking, Ambidextrous 3-Button with Scroll Wheel, Compatible with Laptop, PC, Mac - Black (K72356EU)
features: Optical Sensor - Responsive and reliable optical 800 dpi sensor for precise mouse control; accurately lead the cursor around programs, documents and websites - ideal for workplace or home office use
Scroll Wheel - This USB wired computer mouse features a scroll wheel in the top central area of the computer mouse, so you can speed through long documents and web pages comfortably and efficiently
Ambidextrous Design - Comfortable, rounded shape means that this is the ideal right-handed mouse or left-handed mouse depending on the user; the full-size mouse is contoured for comfort and grip
Plug and Play Set Up - 1.8 m USB 3.0 cable offers plug and play, without the need to download any drivers or software - a USB-C to USB 3.0 adapter ma be required for use with newer Mac products
Compatibility - This USB wired computer mouse is compatible with Vista, Windows 7, XP, Windows 8, Windows 10, macOS X 10.11, macOS 10.10 or above, Chrome OS 44 or above, macOS 10.9
description: From the manufacturer Comfort Meets Simplicity The Kensington Mouse-in-a-Box provides reliable optical performance whilst being affordable. It offers hassle-free plug and play installation so it works with your computer, right out of the box.
